latest_stable_release.verified_from: GitHub Releases API repos/openai/codex/releases?per_page=30 filtered for non-draft non-prerelease releases

notes: Current Sticky main was created from an initial upstream/main migration, not from the latest stable release tag.
latest_stable_release records the current GitHub stable release to watch for future syncs; it is not the exact base tag of this Sticky code.
Future standardized Sticky releases should be created only after explicitly syncing an official stable release tag.
Historical sticky tag v0.1.0 must be preserved and never overwritten or deleted.
